header.title: Plans for every stage
header.subtitle: Choose Marketplace for guide discovery, or Operations for internal team management. No hidden fees.

desc.marketplaceText: — Open platform with guide discovery, escrow payments, SOS broadcast, and trust scoring. For operators who need to find and hire freelance guides.
desc.operationsText: — Closed ecosystem for companies with their own guides. No marketplace, no escrow fees. Just team management, tour tracking, and operational tools.

guide.title: Free to start. Pro to grow.
guide.subtitle: No subscription required — start guiding immediately. Upgrade to Pro for lower fees, priority matching, and professional tools that help you earn more.
guide.feeDesc: A small platform fee is deducted from each payout to cover escrow processing, payment security, and dispute protection. Pro guides enjoy a significantly lower fee.
guide.freeDesc: Get started, build your profile, and start earning right away.
guide.proFeeDesc: Only 2% platform fee — save 60% on fees
guide.proDesc: Professional tools for serious guides. Earn more, rank higher, protect your record.
guide.rulesDesc1: Lunavia tracks every guide's reliability to protect operators and maintain platform quality. Consistent performance is rewarded.
guide.rewardDesc2: , operator trust badge, and higher visibility.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What's the difference between Marketplace and Operations?
faq.a1: Marketplace gives you access to our guide discovery network with escrow payments. Operations is for companies who already have their own guides — no marketplace fees, just team management tools.
faq.q2: Why do Operations plans have 0% commission?
faq.a2: Operations plans don't use escrow — you pay your guides directly through your own payroll. There's no payment intermediary, so no commission.
faq.q3: Can I switch between Marketplace and Operations?
faq.a3: Yes! Contact our team to switch your product line. Enterprise plans can even combine both — use marketplace when you need extra guides and operations for your internal team.
faq.q4: What happens when I reach my tour limit?
faq.a4: You'll see an upgrade prompt. Upgrade to a higher plan anytime to increase your limits. Existing tours continue running normally.

bottomCta.title: Ready to get started?
bottomCta.subtitle: Start with our Free plan — no credit card required.

hero.subtitle: Tour management, guide marketplace, escrow payment, and governance — in one platform.

modules.title: Everything you need to operate
modules.subtitle: Three integrated systems that cover the full lifecycle of tour operations.

m1.title: Tour Management
m1.desc: Create, schedule, and manage tours with structured lifecycle tracking. From draft to completion, every stage is governed and auditable.

m2.title: Guide Marketplace
m2.desc: Access a verified pool of professional tour guides. Filter by expertise, language, location, and trust score to find the right match.

m3.title: Escrow & Trust Transparency
m3.desc: All payments are escrow-protected. Trust scores are earned through verified performance, not purchased — ensuring a fair, merit-based marketplace.

hybrid.subtitle: Operators can assign their internal team to tours or open positions to the marketplace. Mix-and-match based on demand, season, and specialization — all within one platform.

assign.title: Assign internal guides
assign.desc: Directly assign tours to your in-house team with no marketplace exposure.

open.title: Open to marketplace
open.desc: Post open positions to the verified freelance guide network when you need extra hands.

compliance.title: Built on verified trust
compliance.subtitle: Every participant is verified. Every transaction is protected. Every action is transparent.

c1.title: Verified Operators
c1.desc: Every operator undergoes identity and business verification before accessing the platform.

c2.title: Compliance Levels
c2.desc: Structured compliance tiers ensure regulatory alignment across different operator categories.

c3.title: Trust Score
c3.desc: Transparent, merit-based scoring earned through operational performance — not payment.

c4.title: Escrow Protection
c4.desc: All financial transactions flow through escrow until service delivery is confirmed by both parties.

moneyFlow.title: See exactly where every dong goes
moneyFlow.subtitle: No hidden fees. All payments flow through regulated escrow. Both operators and guides see the full breakdown before confirming.

step1.title: Operator pays
step1.desc: The full guide rate is deposited into Lunavia's escrow account before the tour starts.

step2.title: Escrow holds safely
step2.desc: Funds are held in a regulated escrow account until the tour is completed and confirmed by both parties.

step3.title: Guide receives payout
step3.desc: After tour confirmation, the guide receives their payout minus a small platform service fee.

fees.operatorNote: Free plan rate — lower with Pro, Elite

moneyFlow.disclaimer: Lunavia operates as a licensed escrow intermediary. Funds are never commingled with operating revenue. Vietnamese law compliant.

hero.subtitle: Lunavia is not a tour operator. We are the regulated marketplace infrastructure that connects operators and guides with the tools, governance, and trust they need to operate at scale.

vision.title: A national marketplace built on transparency
vision.desc1: We envision a tourism industry where every operator is verified, every guide is protected, and every transaction is transparent. Lunavia is building the foundational infrastructure to make this a reality — not as a competitor to operators, but as the neutral platform that empowers their growth.
vision.desc2: Our goal is to become the standard for compliant, trustworthy tour operations — first nationally, then regionally, then globally.

approach.title: Infrastructure-first
approach.subtitle: We don't operate tours. We build the systems that make tour operations trustworthy, efficient, and compliant.
approach.c1Desc: Behavioural analytics and transparent trust scoring that rewards quality service without bias.
approach.c2Desc: Escrow-based financial infrastructure ensuring funds flow only when service is confirmed.
approach.c3Desc: Compliance tracking, incident management, and audit trails for regulatory alignment.

compliance.title: Regulatory compliance by design
compliance.desc1: Compliance is not an afterthought on Lunavia. Our platform architecture enforces verification, documentation, and auditability at every layer — from user onboarding to payment settlement.
compliance.desc2: We work to ensure that operators and guides operating on Lunavia meet the regulatory expectations of their market, so that every participant can operate with confidence.
items: Complete audit trail for every transaction

visionLong.title: Building the national marketplace
visionLong.subtitle: Lunavia is building toward becoming the definitive infrastructure for tourism operations. We see a future where every licensed operator and every certified guide in the country operates on a single, trusted, regulated platform — raising the standard for the entire industry.
visionLong.p1Desc: Core marketplace, trust systems, escrow, and compliance infrastructure.
visionLong.p2Desc: Regulatory partnerships, operator onboarding at scale, industry standard adoption.
visionLong.p3Desc: Cross-border compliance, multi-market support, international operator networks.

FAQ.title: FAQ — Lunavia
FAQ.q1: How does the Trust Score work?
FAQ.a1: Your Trust Score is calculated based on your activity, verification status, and community feedback. Completing tours successfully, verifying your identity (KYC/KYB), and maintaining a clean incident record increases your score.
FAQ.a2: Verification is highly recommended. While you can browse some features without it, verified partners get significantly higher visibility and are preferred by operators and guides for reliability.
FAQ.a3: Lunavia currently focuses on matching and operations management. Payment terms are agreed upon directly between the Operator and the Guide. We do not process payments on the platform at this time.
FAQ.a4: Yes, but cancellations may impact your Trust Score. We encourage you to communicate early with your partners. Frequent cancellations may lead to account suspension.

TrustSafety.title: Trust & Safety — Lunavia
TrustSafety.desc: How Lunavia calculates trust scores, reliability scores, and protects both operators and guides.

hero.title: How trust works on Lunavia
hero.subtitle: Every user earns a Trust Score and Reliability Score based on real performance data — not marketing promises. Here's exactly how they work.

trust.title: Trust Score
trust.desc: A 0–100 score reflecting your overall platform reputation. Combines your verification status, performance history, financial behavior, and compliance. Operators and guides have different formulas tailored to their roles.
trust.note: Affects visibility, matching priority, and feature access

reliability.title: Reliability Score
reliability.desc: A percentage-based score (0–100%) tracking your dependability. Primarily measures cancellation behavior, no-shows, and deadline adherence. Drops sharply for late cancellations and recovers slowly through consistent performance.
reliability.note: Affects tour application acceptance and account standing

operator.title: Operator Trust Score
operator.desc: Your trust score is the sum of four positive components minus any penalties. Maximum score is 90 (Licensed), 70 (Agency), or 50 (Sole Proprietor).
operator.formula: Trust = Legal Base + Compliance + Performance + Financial − Penalties

performance.title: Performance (0–25 pts)
performance.desc: Based on your tour completion rate. Needs at least 3 tours for meaningful data. New operators start with 12 points (neutral).

financial.title: Financial Behavior (0–15 pts)
financial.desc: Based on clean payment history. Disputes reduce your score. Clean record = full 15 points. New operators start with 8 points.

penalties.title: Penalty Deductions
penalties.desc: Penalties are subtracted from your score. Each type is capped at 30 points, and total penalties are capped at 40 to prevent a single incident from destroying your reputation.
penalties.finDesc: Payment disputes, escrow violations, suspicious transfers
penalties.riskDesc: Policy violations, compliance issues, flagged behavior

guide.title: Guide Trust Score
guide.desc: Guides are individuals — no legal base or compliance component. Your score is built entirely from how you perform.
guide.formula: Trust = Base (30) + Completion + Rating + Reliability − Penalties

base.title: Base Score: 30 pts
base.desc: Every guide starts with 30 points upon registration. This is your starting foundation.

completion.title: Completion Rate (0–30 pts)
completion.desc: Tours completed vs total assigned. Need at least 3 tours for scoring. 100% completion = 30 points.

rating.title: Rating Score (0–25 pts)
rating.desc: Average operator rating (1–5 stars) converted to points. 5 stars = 25 points. Needs at least 3 ratings.

reliability.title: Reliability (0–15 pts)
reliability.desc: Starts at 15. Each no-show costs −5 pts. Each late cancellation costs −3 pts. Based on last 90 days.

reliabilityScore.title: Reliability Score
reliabilityScore.desc: Your reliability score starts at 100% and reflects how dependable you are. It's separate from Trust Score and focus specifically on cancellation and commitment behavior.

standard.title: ⚠️ Standard
standard.i3: Some operators may prefer higher-rated guides

late.title: Late Cancellation (within 48h of departure)
late.desc: The most penalized behavior. Canceling close to departure leaves operators scrambling to find replacements.

noshow.title: No-Show
noshow.desc: Not showing up to an assigned tour is the most serious offense. Multiple no-shows may result in account suspension.

incident.title: Incident Reports (confirmed against you)
incident.desc: Minor issues: −3pts. Moderate: −10pts. Severe: −25pts. Only deducted after investigation confirms fault.

completion.title: Tour Completion
completion.desc: Every completed tour improves your reliability. Consistency is rewarded — your score recovers over time through good behavior.

fees.title: Platform Fees
fees.desc: Transparent fees — you always know what you're paying. No hidden charges, ever.
fees.opNote: Commission is charged per escrow transaction, deducted before guide payout. Operations plans don't use escrow — pay guides directly.
fees.gdNote: Platform service fee covers escrow processing, payment security, and dispute protection. Deducted automatically from each payout.

decay.title: Trust Decay & Recovery
decay.desc: Trust isn't static. Inactive accounts gradually lose trust score, while active users maintain and grow theirs.

inactivity.title: Inactivity Decay
inactivity.desc: Accounts inactive for extended periods see gradual trust score reduction. This ensures active, engaged users rank higher.

recovery.title: Recovery Through Activity
recovery.desc: Complete tours, maintain clean payments, and avoid cancellations. Your score will recover and grow over time.

caps.title: Penalty Caps
caps.desc: Individual penalties are capped (max 30 each, total max 40). One bad day won't destroy years of good reputation.

matching.title: How Trust Affects Matching
matching.desc: When operators search for guides or the system ranks applicants, trust plays a major role.

rel.title: Reliability Score
rel.desc: Dependability is weighted highest because operators need guides who show up and don't cancel.

trust.title: Trust Score
trust.desc: Overall platform reputation, including ratings, completion history, and verification status.

tourHealth.title: Tour Health System
tourHealth.desc: Real-time operational monitoring for every active tour. See how Lunavia tracks start delays, segment progress, incidents, and guide activity — computed into a live 0–100 health score.

cta.title: Start building your trust
cta.desc: Create your account, complete verification, and start earning your reputation on Lunavia.

TourHealth.title: Tour Health System — Lunavia
TourHealth.desc: How Lunavia monitors every active tour in real-time. Understand tour health scores, status signals, and how we protect your operations.

hero.title: Tour Health System
hero.subtitle: Real-time monitoring for every active tour. Like flight operations status for airlines — Lunavia gives operators and admins instant visibility into tour execution health.

whatIsIt.title: Your tour's vital signs
whatIsIt.p1: Tour Health is a real-time monitoring system that tracks every active tour's operational status. It combines multiple signals — start time, segment progress, incidents, and guide activity — into a single health score and status.
whatIsIt.p2: Think of it like a hospital patient monitor: when everything is green, your tour is running smoothly. When signals go yellow or red, you know exactly what's wrong and can act immediately.

scoreSystem.title: Health Score (0–100)
scoreSystem.desc: Each tour receives a real-time composite score from five weighted factors. Computed on-demand from actual execution data — nothing self-reported.

f1.name: Segment Progress
f1.desc: Are tour segments being completed at the expected pace? Compares actual check-in progress against time elapsed.
f1.d2: Time-aware: compares actual vs expected progress
f1.d3: Accounts for tour duration and elapsed time

f2.name: Start Delay
f2.desc: Did the tour start on time? Late starts cascade into other problems.

f3.name: Skipped Segments
f3.desc: Were any tour segments skipped? Skipping segments means tourists miss planned experiences.
f3.d2: Score decreases proportionally with skip ratio

f4.name: Incidents
f4.desc: Are there open incidents on this tour? Severity matters.

f5.name: Guide Reliability
f5.desc: Is the guide actively checking in? Long silence during a tour is a risk signal.

statusZones.title: Four Health Zones
statusZones.desc: Health scores map to four status zones. Each zone triggers different levels of visibility and alerts on the Command Center.

healthy.title: Healthy
healthy.desc: Tour is running on schedule. All segments on track, guide active, no incidents. No action needed.

minorRisk.title: Minor Risk
minorRisk.desc: Slight delays or missed check-ins. Worth monitoring but likely recoverable. Shows as yellow on Command Center.

atRisk.title: At Risk
atRisk.desc: Significant delays, guide unresponsive, or multiple issues. Operator should intervene. Alert system may trigger notifications.

critical.title: Critical
critical.desc: Tour has serious operational issues. Immediate action required — may involve SOS broadcast, guide replacement, or incident escalation.

stateMachine.title: Five Operational States
stateMachine.desc: Beyond the numeric score, each tour has a categorical state based on real events. States follow a priority system — higher-severity states override lower ones.

health.title: HEALTHY
health.desc: All systems normal — on schedule, guide active, no incidents
health.t1: Default state when no issues detected
health.t2: Reverts to HEALTHY when all incidents resolved

atRisk.title: AT_RISK
atRisk.desc: Warning signals detected — may escalate without intervention
atRisk.t1: Pickup not started 15+ min after scheduled time
atRisk.t2: Guide not verified close to departure

delayed.title: DELAYED
delayed.desc: Tour started late — confirmed delay in execution timeline
delayed.t1: Tour actually started 15+ minutes after scheduled time

incident.title: INCIDENT
incident.t1: One or more unresolved incidents on the tour
incident.t2: Remains until all incidents are resolved
incident.t3: Counts active incident reports from guides or operators

sosActive.title: SOS_ACTIVE
sosActive.desc: Emergency — SOS broadcast triggered for urgent guide replacement
sosActive.t1: Active SOS broadcast on the tour
sosActive.t2: Highest priority — overrides all other states
sosActive.t3: Triggered when guide cancels last-minute and operator needs emergency replacement

stateMachine.priorityDesc: Higher-priority states always override lower ones. A tour with both an incident and a delay shows as INCIDENT.

whoSeesWhat.title: Who sees Tour Health?
whoSeesWhat.desc: Different roles see different views — all based on the same real-time data.

operator.title: Operators
operator.i1: Command Center — see all today's tours with health status
operator.i2: Health counts: how many healthy, at-risk, incident
operator.i3: Can drill into individual tour health factors

integratedWith.title: Integrated with
integratedWith.desc: Tour Health connects to other Lunavia systems for automated responses.

cta.title: Run tours with confidence
cta.desc: Tour Health is included in all plans. Start monitoring your operations in real-time.

Terms.title: Terms — Lunavia
Terms.p1Desc: Welcome to Lunavia. By accessing our platform, you agree to these terms.
Terms.p2Desc: You agree to provide accurate information during verification and to conduct yourself professionally during all tours arranged via our platform.
Terms.p3Desc: We take safety seriously. Any reported incidents may result in permanent suspension of your account.
Terms.p4Desc: Lunavia is a matching platform. We are not responsible for the actions of Guides or Operators outside of the platform.

Privacy.title: Privacy — Lunavia
Privacy.p1Desc: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, verify your identity, or communicate with us.
Privacy.p2Desc: We use your information to operate and improve our platform, including trust score calculations and partner matching.
Privacy.p3Desc: We verify your identity with third-party providers but do not sell your personal data to advertisers.

MarketingFooter.brand_desc: Tour operations and guide marketplace platform. Connecting operators and guides with trust.
